intro: Zichya sericea, also known as Ziziphus jujuba, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Asia, belonging to the Rhamnaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and reduce stress. The bioactive constituents of Zichya sericea include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, such as betulinic acid and jujubogenin. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
